statements.sql: select * from `school_inquiries` where `invoice_number` = 'JT-1771396753' limit 1 for update
select * from `schools` where `support_email` = 'piipi@gmail.com' and `schools`.`deleted_at` is null limit 1

insert into `schools` (`name`, `support_email`, `support_phone`, `address`, `tagline`, `status`, `installed`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) values ('popopopo', 'piipi@gmail.com', '0987890', 'sasajalan', 'jalan amin ga tau', 1, 1, '2026-02-18 13:42:37', '2026-02-18 13:42:37')
select * from `users` where `email` = 'piipi@gmail.com' and `users`.`deleted_at` is null limit 1
select * from `roles` where (`name` = 'School Admin' and `school_id` = 22) limit 1

select column_name as `name`, data_type as `type_name`, column_type as `type`, collation_name as `collation`, is_nullable as `nullable`, column_default as `default`, column_comment as `comment`, extra as `extra` from information_schema.columns where table_schema = 'laravel' and table_name = 'roles' order by ordinal_position asc

select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (23) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\User'
